name: io.github.vulkanr/lastbluetape-mcp
title: LastBlueTape
description: Construction punch list management for AI agents. Create lists, add items, track progress.

environmentVariables.name: LASTBLUETAPE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your LastBlueTape API key for authentication (starts with lbt_)

environmentVariables.name: LASTBLUETAPE_PAYMENT_METHOD
environmentVariables.description: Optional Stripe payment method ID (pm_xxx) for auto-upgrading lists to Pro
